name: Crockpot Italian Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can Italian zucchini and squash mix (14.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger meat in a skillet over medium heat until no longer pink.
2. Drain any excess fat from the pan.
3. Transfer all ingredients to the crockpot.
4. Cook on low for 6-8 hours or until the vegetables are tender.
5. Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
